text:
OUD_HOSP_MEDICARE_EVER Opioid-Related Hospitalization or ED First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicare Only Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
 OUD_MAT_COMBINED Use of Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 OUD_MAT_MEDICAID Use of Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims
